title: viola grayi f. glabra
intro: Viola grayi f. glabra, also known as the smooth-leaved purple viola or yellow viola, is a species of flowering plant in the violet family (Violaceae) that is native to North America. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Viola grayi f. glabra include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
